title: dalea neomexicana var. neomexicana
intro: Dalea neomexicana var. neomexicana, commonly known as New Mexico prairie clover, is a perennial legume native to the southwestern United States and Mexico. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its high content of isoflavones and other bioactive compounds that have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Dalea neomexicana var. neomexicana include its potential to alleviate menopausal symptoms, improve cardiovascular health, and provide antioxidant protection against cell damage. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to support women's health and well-being.
